title: hieracium tonsilingua subsp. griseicaule
intro: Hieracium tonsilingua subsp. griseicaule, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium tonsilingua subsp. griseicaule include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
